title: Rivian Q4 2024 Earnings Results - Gross Profit Milestone
text: Rivian achieved a significant financial milestone in Q4 2024, reporting an automotive gross profit of $110 million for the quarter. The company also generated approximately $60 million in gross profit from software and services, totaling $170 million in overall gross profits. The earnings results exceeded revenue estimates, marking progress for the EV manufacturer as it works to establish its market position. However, the company's 2025 vehicle delivery forecast of 46,000-51,000 units fell short of analyst expectations of 55,000 units, causing stock volatility in after-hours trading. Rivian continues pursuing growth initiatives, including a partnership with Volkswagen to develop collaborative electric vehicles. The company is working to maintain profitability while competing in an increasingly crowded EV market.
